provenance.source: USDA FY2026 SNAP standards, FNA eligibility/BBCE pages, and official scoped-state SNAP policy/manual URLs
provenance.disclaimer: Candidate fixture corpus only; not promoted, not legal advice, and not benefits advice.
provenance.notes: Sixty-five AI-proposed candidates across CA, TX, PA, MS, and GA for Track 5 Phase 2. Outputs are unknown placeholders pending real PolicyEngine/PRD runner execution and Dylan review.
